           key: ${{ env.COPILOT_SESSION_CACHE_KEY }}
           restore-keys: |
             ${{ env.COPILOT_SESSION_CACHE_RESTORE_KEY }}
 
       - name: Install Copilot CLI
         if: vars.AI_AGENT_PROVIDER == 'copilot'
         run: |
           if ! command -v copilot >/dev/null 2>&1; then
             npm install -g @github/copilot@1.0.44
           fi
           copilot --version
           echo "Copilot CLI ready"
 
       - name: Verify Copilot CLI installation
         if: vars.AI_AGENT_PROVIDER == 'copilot'
         env:
           COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.PAT_TOKEN }}
         run: |
           copilot --version || echo "Copilot CLI will be available once credentials are configured"
 
       - name: Validate Copilot model
         if: vars.AI_AGENT_PROVIDER == 'copilot'
         env:
           COPILOT_MODEL: ${{ vars.COPILOT_MODEL }}
         run: |
           if [ -z "${COPILOT_MODEL}" ]; then
             echo "::error::COPILOT_MODEL repository variable must be set for copilot provider"
             exit 1
           fi
           echo "Using Copilot model: ${COPILOT_MODEL}"
 
       - name: Export tool cache keys
         run: bash agents/setup/cache.sh keys dmtools:v1.7.196 codegraph
 
       - name: Cache DMTools
         uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
           path: ${{ env.DMTOOLS_CACHE_PATH }}
           key: ${{ env.DMTOOLS_CACHE_KEY }}
           restore-keys: |
             dmtools-
 
       - name: Cache CodeGraph binary
         uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
           path: ${{ env.CODEGRAPH_CACHE_PATH }}
           key: ${{ env.CODEGRAPH_CACHE_KEY }}
           restore-keys: |
             ${{ runner.os }}-npm-global-codegraph-
             ${{ runner.os }}-npm-global-
 
       - name: Cache CodeGraph index
         uses: actions/cache@v4
         with:
           path: ${{ env.CODEGRAPH_INDEX_CACHE_PATH }}
           key: ${{ env.CODEGRAPH_INDEX_CACHE_KEY }}-${{ github.sha }}
           restore-keys: |
             ${{ env.CODEGRAPH_INDEX_CACHE_KEY }}-${{ github.ref_name }}-
             ${{ env.CODEGRAPH_INDEX_CACHE_KEY }}-
 
       - name: Install DMTools v1.7.196
         run: bash agents/setup/install.sh dmtools:v1.7.196
 
       - name: Install and init CodeGraph
         run: bash agents/setup/codegraph.sh
 
       - name: Install CodeGraph usage guard
         run: |
           real_codegraph="$(command -v codegraph)"
           guard_dir="${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/.agent-bin"
           mkdir -p "${guard_dir}" "${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/.dmtools"
           cat > "${guard_dir}/codegraph" <<EOF
           #!/usr/bin/env bash
           set -euo pipefail
           log="\${CODEGRAPH_USAGE_LOG:-${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/.dmtools/codegraph-usage.log}"
           mkdir -p "\$(dirname "\${log}")"
           printf '%s\tcodegraph' "\$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> "\${log}"
           for arg in "\$@"; do
             printf ' %q' "\${arg}" >> "\${log}"
           done
           printf '\n' >> "\${log}"
           exec "${real_codegraph}" "\$@"
           EOF
           chmod +x "${guard_dir}/codegraph"
           echo "${guard_dir}" >> "${GITHUB_PATH}"
           echo "CODEGRAPH_USAGE_LOG=${GITHUB_WORKSPACE}/.dmtools/codegraph-usage.log" >> "${GITHUB_ENV}"
 
       - name: Configure Git author
         run: |
           git config --global user.name "trackstate-ai"
           git config --global user.email "trackstate-ai@users.noreply.github.com"
 
       - name: Prepare agent config
         env:
           RAW_ENCODED_CONFIG: ${{ inputs.encoded_config }}
         run: |
           node <<'NODE'
           const fs = require('fs');
 
           const raw = process.env.RAW_ENCODED_CONFIG || '';
           let config = {};
 
           if (raw.trim()) {
             const candidates = [raw];
             try {
               candidates.push(decodeURIComponent(raw));
             } catch (error) {
               // Keep raw-only candidates when the input is already JSON.
             }
 
             const parsed = candidates
               .map((candidate) => {
                 try { return JSON.parse(candidate); } catch (error) { return null; }
               })
               .find(Boolean);
 
             if (!parsed) {
               throw new Error('encoded_config is neither JSON nor URL-encoded JSON');
             }
             config = parsed;
           }
 
           config.params = config.params || {};
           const prompts = Array.isArray(config.params.cliPrompts)
             ? config.params.cliPrompts.slice()
             : [];
           ['./agents/prompts/bash_tools.md', './agents/prompts/codegraph_tools.md'].forEach((prompt) => {
             if (!prompts.includes(prompt)) prompts.push(prompt);
           });
           config.params.cliPrompts = prompts;
 
           fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_ENV, `EFFECTIVE_ENCODED_CONFIG=${encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(config))}\n`);
           NODE
 
       - name: Run AI Teammate
         id: run_ai
         env:
           JIRA_EMAIL: ${{ secrets.JIRA_EMAIL }}
           JIRA_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.JIRA_API_TOKEN }}
           JIRA_BASE_PATH: ${{ vars.JIRA_BASE_PATH }}
           JIRA_AUTH_TYPE: ${{ vars.JIRA_AUTH_TYPE }}
           JIRA_TRANSFORM_CUSTOM_FIELDS_TO_NAMES: ${{ vars.JIRA_TRANSFORM_CUSTOM_FIELDS_TO_NAMES }}
           JIRA_EXTRA_FIELDS_PROJECT: ${{ vars.JIRA_EXTRA_FIELDS_PROJECT }}
           JIRA_EXTRA_FIELDS: ${{ vars.JIRA_EXTRA_FIELDS || '[]' }}
           JIRA_CLEAR_CACHE: "true"
           DMTOOLS_CACHE_ENABLED: ${{ vars.DMTOOLS_CACHE_ENABLED }}
 
           CONFLUENCE_EMAIL: ${{ secrets.JIRA_EMAIL }}
           CONFLUENCE_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.JIRA_API_TOKEN }}
           CONFLUENCE_BASE_PATH: ${{ vars.CONFLUENCE_BASE_PATH }}
           CONFLUENCE_DEFAULT_SPACE: ${{ vars.CONFLUENCE_DEFAULT_SPACE }}
 
           FIGMA_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.FIGMA_TOKEN }}
           FIGMA_BASE_PATH: ${{ vars.FIGMA_BASE_PATH }}
 
           PAT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PAT_TOKEN }}
           GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PAT_TOKEN }}
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PAT_TOKEN }}
           SOURCE_GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PAT_TOKEN }}
           SOURCE_GITHUB_WORKSPACE: IstiN
           SOURCE_GITHUB_REPOSITORY: trackstate
 
           GEMINI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}
           GEMINI_MODEL: ${{ vars.GEMINI_MODEL }}
           GEMINI_DEFAULT_MODEL: ${{ vars.GEMINI_DEFAULT_MODEL }}
           GEMINI_BASE_PATH: ${{ vars.GEMINI_BASE_PATH }}
 
           COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN || secrets.PAT_TOKEN }}
           COPILOT_MODEL: ${{ vars.COPILOT_MODEL }}
           AI_AGENT_PROVIDER: ${{ vars.AI_AGENT_PROVIDER }}
           AI_TEAMMATE_CONFIG_FILE: ${{ inputs.config_file }}
           AI_TEAMMATE_CONCURRENCY_KEY: ${{ inputs.concurrency_key }}
           AI_TEAMMATE_DISPLAY_KEY: ${{ inputs.display_key || inputs.concurrency_key }}
 
           DMTOOLS_INTEGRATIONS: "jira,confluence,figma,ai,cli,file,github"
           PROMPT_CHUNK_TOKEN_LIMIT: ${{ vars.PROMPT_CHUNK_TOKEN_LIMIT }}
           CLI_ALLOWED_COMMANDS: "find,ls,cat,mkdir,bash,git,gh,flutter,dart,python3,pytest,run-agent.sh,codegraph"

14. void main() {
15.   test(
16.     'demo repository exposes richer issue schema and repository index data',
17.     () async {
18.       const repository = DemoTrackStateRepository();
19. 
20.       final snapshot = await repository.loadSnapshot();
21.       final issue = snapshot.issues.firstWhere(
22.         (entry) => entry.key == 'TRACK-12',
23.       );
24. 
25.       expect(snapshot.project.key, 'TRACK');
26.       expect(snapshot.project.statusLabel('in-progress'), 'In Progress');
27.       expect(snapshot.project.fieldLabel('storyPoints'), 'Story Points');
28.       expect(
29.         snapshot.project.attachmentStorage.mode,
30.         AttachmentStorageMode.repositoryPath,
31.       );
32.       expect(
33.         snapshot.repositoryIndex.pathForKey('TRACK-12'),
34.         'TRACK/TRACK-1/TRACK-12/main.md',
35.       );
36.       expect(issue.issueTypeId, 'story');
37.       expect(issue.statusId, 'in-progress');
38.       expect(issue.priorityId, 'high');
39.       expect(issue.fixVersionIds, ['mvp']);
40.       expect(issue.watchers, ['ana', 'denis']);
41.       expect(issue.customFields['storyPoints'], 8);
42.       expect(issue.links.single.targetKey, 'TRACK-41');
43.       expect(issue.attachments.single.mediaType, 'image/svg+xml');
44.     },
45.   );
46. 
47.   test(
48.     'provider-backed repository defaults missing attachmentStorage to repository-path',
49.     () async {
50.       final provider = _FakeReleaseAttachmentProvider(
51.         permission: const RepositoryPermission(
52.           canRead: true,
53.           canWrite: true,
54.           isAdmin: false,
55.           canCreateBranch: true,
56.           canManageAttachments: true,
57.           canCheckCollaborators: false,
58.         ),
59.         files: {
60.           'DEMO/project.json': jsonEncode({
61.             'key': 'DEMO',
62.             'name': 'Demo Project',
63.           }),
64.           'DEMO/config/statuses.json': jsonEncode([
65.             {'id': 'todo', 'name': 'To Do'},
66.           ]),
67.           'DEMO/config/issue-types.json': jsonEncode([
68.             {'id': 'story', 'name': 'Story'},
69.           ]),
70.           'DEMO/config/fields.json': jsonEncode([
71.             {
72.               'id': 'summary',
73.               'name': 'Summary',
74.               'type': 'string',
75.               'required': true,
76.             },
77.           ]),
78.           'DEMO/.trackstate/index/issues.json': jsonEncode([
79.             {
80.               'key': 'DEMO-1',
81.               'path': 'DEMO/DEMO-1/main.md',
82.               'parent': null,
83.               'epic': null,
84.               'summary': 'Repository-path default issue',
85.               'issueType': 'story',
86.               'status': 'todo',
87.               'labels': [],
88.               'updated': '2026-05-13T00:00:00Z',
89.               'children': [],
90.               'archived': false,
91.             },
92.           ]),
93.           'DEMO/DEMO-1/main.md': '''

95. key: DEMO-1
96. project: DEMO

98. status: todo

100. updated: 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z
101. ---
102. 
103. # Description
104. 
105. Hosted projects without explicit attachmentStorage should keep repository-path attachments by default.
106. ''',
107.         },
108.       );

+            resolutionDefinitions: sampleProject.resolutionDefinitions,
+            attachmentStorage: sampleProject.attachmentStorage,
+          ),
+          repositoryIndex: sampleSnapshot.repositoryIndex,
+          issues: sampleSnapshot.issues,
+        );
+        final freshSnapshot = TrackerSnapshot(
+          project: ProjectConfig(
+            key: sampleProject.key,
+            name: sampleProject.name,
+            repository: sampleProject.repository,
+            branch: sampleProject.branch,
+            defaultLocale: sampleProject.defaultLocale,
+            supportedLocales: sampleProject.supportedLocales,
+            issueTypeDefinitions: sampleProject.issueTypeDefinitions,
+            statusDefinitions: <TrackStateConfigEntry>[
+              const TrackStateConfigEntry(id: 'todo', name: 'To Do'),
+              const TrackStateConfigEntry(
+                id: 'in-review',
+                name: 'In Review',
+                category: 'indeterminate',
+              ),
+            ],
+            fieldDefinitions: sampleProject.fieldDefinitions,
+            workflowDefinitions: const <TrackStateWorkflowDefinition>[
+              TrackStateWorkflowDefinition(
+                id: 'delivery',
+                name: 'Delivery',
+                statusIds: <String>['todo', 'in-review'],
+                transitions: <TrackStateWorkflowTransition>[
+                  TrackStateWorkflowTransition(
+                    id: 'review',
+                    name: 'Request review',
+                    fromStatusId: 'todo',
+                    toStatusId: 'in-review',
+                  ),
+                ],
+              ),
+            ],
+            priorityDefinitions: sampleProject.priorityDefinitions,
+            versionDefinitions: sampleProject.versionDefinitions,
+            componentDefinitions: sampleProject.componentDefinitions,
+            resolutionDefinitions: sampleProject.resolutionDefinitions,
+            attachmentStorage: sampleProject.attachmentStorage,
+          ),
+          repositoryIndex: sampleSnapshot.repositoryIndex,
+          issues: sampleSnapshot.issues,
+        );
+        final hostedRepository = _FakeSearchRepository(snapshot: staleSnapshot);
+        final providerFactory = _FakeTrackStateCliProviderFactory(
+          hostedProvider: _FakeHostedTrackStateProvider(
+            user: const RepositoryUser(login: 'octocat', displayName: 'Octo Cat'),
+            permission: const RepositoryPermission(
+              canRead: true,
+              canWrite: false,
+              isAdmin: false,
+              canCreateBranch: true,
+              canManageAttachments: false,
+              canCheckCollaborators: false,
+            ),
+          ),
+        );
+        final repositoryFactory = _FakeTrackStateCliRepositoryFactory(
+          hostedRepositoryBuilder: (disableHostedSyncRequestCaching) {
+            hostedRepository.snapshot = disableHostedSyncRequestCaching
+                ? freshSnapshot
+                : staleSnapshot;
+            return hostedRepository;
+          },
+        );
+        final cli = TrackStateCli(
+          environment: const TrackStateCliEnvironment(
+            environment: <String, String>{
+              trackStateCliTokenEnvironmentVariable: 'env-token',
+            },
+          ),
+          providerFactory: providerFactory,
+          repositoryFactory: repositoryFactory,
+        );
+
+        final result = await cli.run(const <String>[
+          'session',
+          '--target',
+          'hosted',
+          '--provider',
+          'github',
+          '--repository',
+          'owner/repo',
+          '--branch',
+          'main',
+        ]);
+        final json = jsonDecode(result.stdout) as Map<String, Object?>;
+        final data = json['data']! as Map<String, Object?>;
+        final projectConfig = data['projectConfig']! as Map<String, Object?>;
+        final statuses = projectConfig['statuses']! as List<Object?>;
+        final workflows = projectConfig['workflows']! as List<Object?>;
+        final delivery = workflows.single as Map<String, Object?>;
+        final transitions = delivery['transitions']! as List<Object?>;
+
+        expect(result.exitCode, 0);
+        expect(providerFactory.lastDisableHostedSyncRequestCaching, isTrue);
+        expect(repositoryFactory.lastDisableHostedSyncRequestCaching, isTrue);
+        expect(
+          statuses.any(
+            (status) =>
+                (status as Map<String, Object?>)['id'] == 'in-review' &&
+                status['name'] == 'In Review',
+          ),
+          isTrue,
+        );
+        expect(delivery['id'], 'delivery');
+        expect(transitions, hasLength(1));
+        expect((transitions.single as Map<String, Object?>)['name'], 'Request review');
+      },
+    );
